title: eryngium × chevalieri
intro: Eryngium × chevalieri, also known as Chevalier's Sea Holly, is a hybrid of the Eryngium alpinum and Eryngium maritimum species, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eryngium × chevalieri include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues such as skin conditions and digestive problems. Eryngium × chevalieri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in folk medicine to create topical applications, such as creams and ointments.
